_description: Standalone actuarial model for the Italy Post-THR Rehabilitation Plan (italy-thr-rehab-2026). All monetary amounts in EUR (1 unit = €1.00). References: pazienti.it, vannistrigelli.com, prontopro.it, tiassisto.it, quotidianosanita.it (2025-2026 Italian market rates).

cptCodesCovered.description: Total knee arthroplasty (used as proxy billing unit for THR OR)

sources: prontopro.it / cronoshare.it — 2026 domiciliary physio market rates
tiassisto.it — 2026 RSA/rehab facility daily rates (North-Centre Italy)

phase1_hospital.label: Surgical episode + 7-day inpatient stay
phase1_hospital.rationale: Mid-range private clinic, North-Centre Italy, standard prosthesis

phase2_rehabFacility.label: Inpatient rehabilitation facility
includes: Gait training, ROM exercises, ADL rehabilitation
phase2_rehabFacility.rationale: Private RSA/riabilitazione intensiva, national average 2026 after +14.7% tariff uplift

phase3_homeRehab.label: Home physiotherapy
phase3_homeRehab.rationale: National average domiciliary rate 2026, including travel supplement

rationale.utilizationRate: THR incidence in 50-70 age cohort ~1-2% per year. Pool assumed to target higher-risk members post-diagnosis or post-surgical authorization. 5% is conservative estimate for an enrolled population that has already received surgical indication.
rationale.bufferMargin: 20% reserve buffer covers: claim processing delays, partial denials, exceptional cases above mean cost, operational overhead.
rationale.poolSize: Minimum viable pool for meaningful risk diversification. At 5% utilization, n=100 yields 5 expected claims/year — statistically stable with low variance per central limit theorem.

sponsorSeedFunding.description: One-time sponsor contribution to pre-fund the pool before premium inflows reach steady state. Covers ~30% of expected annual payout per tier.

lpBackstop.description: Liquidity backstop for variance above expected utilization. Covers approximately 2 additional full-100% claims beyond the expected 5.
lpBackstop.rationale: At 5% utilization with n=100, Poisson variance = sqrt(5) ≈ 2.2. Backstop covers +2 sigma event.

oracleAttestation.secondaryOracle: Optional: wearable device (ORACLE_TYPE_WEARABLE_DATA_PROVIDER) attesting gait metrics
oracleAttestation.quorum: 1-of-1 (single physio) or 2-of-2 (physio + wearable) if wearable enrolled
oracleAttestation.evidencePolicy: All clinical data stored off-chain (IPFS or encrypted store). Only blake3 hashes committed on-chain. GDPR compliant.

bondMechanic.purpose: Adherence incentive. Refunded to patient if HHS >= 80 at day 90. Redistributed to pool if patient abandons protocol.

sensitivityAnalysis.description: Impact of varying utilization rate on premium sustainability at standard-70% tier

scenarios.note: Premium becomes unaffordable — pool requires sponsor subsidy or LP backstop expansion
